title: Technical Stack Evolution - Factual Source
content:
Stack evolution described in guides:
- Early phase: full-stack engineering foundations with web and database systems.
- ML phase: Python-centric modeling stack for NLP and document intelligence in enterprise projects.
- Graduate phase: deep learning, distributed systems, cloud tooling, and statistical foundations strengthened through coursework and projects.
- Current phase: GenAI production stack with RAG orchestration, retrieval systems, LLM tuning, and MLOps practices.

Recurring platform capabilities:
- Data processing and feature workflows for large document corpora.
- Model development and evaluation across traditional ML and transformer-based approaches.
- Deployment and operational tooling for production reliability, monitoring, and optimization.

Career interpretation value:
- Demonstrates continuity from software foundations to production AI system architecture.
- Enables prompt responses that explain not only what tools are used, but why the stack changed over time.
